name: Stewed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tomatoes in boiling water for a few minutes, then remove and peel the skin.
2. Cut the tomatoes in half and place them in a pot with all the seasonings.
3. Cook until the tomatoes are soft.
4. In a separate pan, cut the onion into 1/2-inch cubes and sauté in margarine until soft.
5. When the tomatoes are soft, add the onions to the pot.
6. Cut the celery stalk into 1/2-inch cubes and cook separately.
7. When the celery is soft, add it to the mixture of tomatoes and onions.
8. If using canned tomatoes, add a little more sugar and less seasoning.
